rationale: Cian et al. is cited repeatedly in the theory and contribution sections, not just once in a reference list. The citing paper explicitly references that logo dynamism influences consumer behavior via brand impressions, using this as part of the motivation for studying descriptiveness effects. The citation also supports design-related interpretation (e.g., dynamism as a potential confound) and helps position the paper within prior logo-design research. This indicates a meaningful framing foundation rather than a purely passing mention.
relation_description: The citing paper uses Cian et al. (2014) as core prior evidence that logo design characteristics can shape brand impressions and consumer outcomes. It then builds its own argument on that established stream by introducing logo descriptiveness as another design characteristic that affects brand equity.
